findings.description: REQ-004-AC-5 (mode written to context variable) lacks direct unit test.
REQ-006-AC-3 (scan supplements not replaces) has no direct test.
MOD-002 has zero error-path tests. Spec defines ARTIFACT_NOT_FOUND, EXTRACTION_FAILED, WRITE_ERROR but none tested.
MOD-004 has zero boundary tests. Missing: corrupted profile, .git with no commits, null userChoice.
MOD-008 no test for profile write failure after build.
TEST-030/031 should clarify mock vs real FS.
TEST-012/013 ears_ref to REQ-001-AC-2 is tangential.
PROP-008 ambiguous about allowed profile-sourced fields.
